overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077). The player character runs through a covered urban walkway into an open plaza with holographic advertisements, navigates past pedestrians and military vehicles, and ascends a ramp toward a large spherical building complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: large male NPC in brown jacket passes close to camera on right side
approaching exit of covered walkway, bright sunlight visible ahead

agents.ego_description: sprinting forward through covered walkway, weaving past pedestrians and green barriers

notable_agents.action: male in brown jacket and green shorts walking in same direction, briefly blocks view
character in green outfit with red hair standing near the pink wall

entered.detail: elevated highway overhead with geometric black and white ceiling panels
pink concrete wall covered in black and white graffiti tags
lime green construction barriers lining the walkway
tall cylindrical building with horizontal pink and white stripes
futuristic storefronts with reflective glass windows

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a covered urban walkway beneath an elevated highway structure. The left side features a pink graffiti-covered wall and green barriers, while the distinctive pink cylindrical building of Night City is visible ahead on the right. The character weaves past several pedestrians in the semi-shaded corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: exits covered walkway into bright open plaza with large digital billboards
military-style truck drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: sprinting through open plaza toward the pink building, passing other pedestrians and vehicles

notable_agents.action: green military truck driving along the street parallel to the character

entered.detail: tall building facade displaying large glowing holographic advertisements including 'BRIGHT ON' text
elevated platform with industrial structures suspended above the street
large spherical wireframe structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a sunlit urban plaza dominated by towering holographic advertisements on building facades. The pink cylindrical building looms larger on the right as the character runs forward. A military truck passes by on the street, and a large geodesic dome becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending ramp leading to terraced residential district

events.description: character turns left and begins ascending a sloped ramp
convoy of military jeeps passes by on the right while ascending the ramp

agents.ego_description: turning left and running up a sloped roadway ramp, moving away from the main plaza toward elevated buildings

notable_agents.action: military jeep driving up the ramp alongside the character, followed by additional vehicles

entered.detail: large spherical glass building perched atop a stone and vegetation base
multi-level building with concrete terraces covered in greenery and palm trees
sloped asphalt roadway with painted markings ascending to upper city level

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and ascends a sloped ramp leading upward through the city. The large spherical building becomes the focal point ahead, while terraced buildings with lush vegetation line the right side. Military vehicles drive up the ramp alongside the character, and the geodesic dome fades into the left background.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian approach to spherical landmark building

events.description: transitions from ramp to concrete stairs and walkway approaching the spherical building

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs and walkway toward the base of the large spherical building, moving through landscaped terraces

entered.detail: concrete stairs with pink railings leading upward alongside the path
water cascading down the stone base of the spherical building
curved white and gray apartment complex with multiple balconies

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character ascending concrete stairs and walkways toward the base of the massive spherical building. Waterfalls cascade down the building's stone foundation, and modern apartment buildings become visible to the left. The character moves through a landscaped area with palm trees as they approach the landmark structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded urban corridor into a sprawling, sunlit futuristic plaza that culminates at the base of a massive spherical landmark. It begins with the character running through a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, weaving past pedestrians beside pink graffiti-covered walls. As the character emerges from the corridor, the scene opens into a bright plaza dominated by towering holographic advertisements and a passing military truck, with a large geodesic dome appearing in the distance. The camera then shifts as the character turns left to ascend a sloped ramp, passing terraced buildings with lush vegetation and military vehicles while the spherical building becomes the central focus. Finally, the movement leads up concrete stairs and through a landscaped area with palm trees, approaching the stone foundation of the spherical structure where waterfalls cascade down the walls.
